Expanded.Title: Critical Forge Expanded
Expanded.Description: A general expansion with additional cards for critical hits, fumbles, spell attacks, and saving throws.

OpeningInTheGuard.Title: Opening in the Guard
OpeningInTheGuard.Description: The critical slash tears open the target's guard. It is off-guard for 1 round.
